company.name_jp: ドローン・アイティー株式会社

research_notes: President 金子信洋 and Director 松本隆裕 confirmed from company page. Founded 2019-08-01. Capital 800万JPY. Multiple government certifications including MLIT registered training organization. Drone×IT® is a registered trademark. Note: registered address in task (磯子区汐見台) differs from website address (西区北幸); website shows actual office location.
